added_items.final_wording: Defines the Dubai telehealth setting and menstrual, pain, associated symptom, functional impact, contraception, medical, surgical, and sexual history required for dysmenorrhoea assessment.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Dysmenorrhoea – 26
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed healthcare facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for adult dysmenorrhoea documentation in Dubai telehealth; partial for adolescents, face-to-face examination, pregnancy complications, and non-Dubai settings.

exact_location.heading: 2. Scope; 3. Purpose; 4. Applicability; 5.1 Virtual Clinical Assessment and Clinical History

source.evidence_paraphrase: Defines the Dubai telehealth setting and menstrual, pain, associated symptom, functional impact, contraception, medical, surgical, and sexual history required for dysmenorrhoea assessment.

added_items.rationale: Directly supports mapped dysmenorrhoea terminology, menstrual and pain history, associated symptoms, functional impact, and prior response fields in the stated population.

added_items.final_wording: Lists sudden or constant severe pain, peritonism, fever, abnormal bleeding or discharge, instability, anaemia, weight loss, infertility, dyspareunia, non-midline pain, and progressive symptoms as concern features.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Dysmenorrhoea – 26
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed healthcare facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for adult dysmenorrhoea documentation in Dubai telehealth; partial for adolescents, face-to-face examination, pregnancy complications, and non-Dubai settings.

exact_location.heading: 6. Red Flags and exclusion of secondary dysmenorrhoea

source.evidence_paraphrase: Lists sudden or constant severe pain, peritonism, fever, abnormal bleeding or discharge, instability, anaemia, weight loss, infertility, dyspareunia, non-midline pain, and progressive symptoms as concern features.

added_items.rationale: Directly supports mapped concern prompts and specific negatives only when assessed or reported.

added_items.final_wording: Describes lifestyle measures and follow-up after teleconsultation; medication doses were reviewed but are not mapped into the workflow.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Dysmenorrhoea – 26

source.exclusions: Direct for adult dysmenorrhoea documentation in Dubai telehealth; partial for adolescents, face-to-face examination, pregnancy complications, and non-Dubai settings.

exact_location.heading: 8. Management — non-pharmacological measures and follow-up

source.evidence_paraphrase: Describes lifestyle measures and follow-up after teleconsultation; medication doses were reviewed but are not mapped into the workflow.

added_items.rationale: Supports mapped lifestyle and clinician-documented follow-up discussion without importing medication doses.

added_items.final_wording: Defines emergency and specialist referral contexts for sudden or severe pain, peritonism, pregnancy concern, abnormal bleeding, fever or discharge, progressive symptoms, and suspected secondary pathology.

source.evidence_paraphrase: Defines emergency and specialist referral contexts for sudden or severe pain, peritonism, pregnancy concern, abnormal bleeding, fever or discharge, progressive symptoms, and suspected secondary pathology.

added_items.rationale: Supports mapped warning, worsening, and clinician-arranged review documentation.
